documentation.description: Byte order conversion (Modbus uses Big-Endian / Network Byte Order)

simple_types.name: Word_Order
simple_types.code:
type Word_Order is
  (Big_Endian,
   Little_Endian,
   Mid_Big_Endian,
   Mid_Little_Endian);

enumeration_literals.name: Big_Endian
enumeration_literals.description: ABCD: High word first (SunSpec, Modbus standard)

enumeration_literals.name: Mid_Big_Endian
enumeration_literals.description: BADC: High word first, bytes swapped

enumeration_literals.name: Mid_Little_Endian
enumeration_literals.description: CDAB: Low word first, bytes swapped (common)

subprograms.name: From_Big_Endian
subprograms.code: function From_Big_Endian (High, Low : Byte) return Register_Value

subprograms.name: From_Unsigned_32
Registers_To_Unsigned_32
To_Unsigned_32
